title: presence-contract.json — per-state expected presence (makes the advisory grade actionable)
description: Fed from the app's gating logic for each state. The grader classifies a vision 'absent' finding: absent-but-listed-in-present -> HARD finding (bug); absent-and-listed-in-absentByGating -> SUPPRESSED. Closes FIXTURE/RENDER presence bugs only; gating-LOGIC regressions belong in the app's unit tests.

gatingInputs.description: The inputs that produced this state (rank, tier, scenario, …) — documents WHY the presence list is what it is.

present.description: Regions that MUST render for this state (dot-path tags).

absentByGating.description: Regions correctly ABSENT for this state (suppress vision 'missing' findings on these).
